nasb.text: So the servant placed his hand under the thigh of Abraham his master, and swore to him concerning this matter.

esv.text: So the servant put his hand under the thigh of Abraham his master and swore to him concerning this matter.

cnv.text: 於是，僕人把手放在他主人亞伯拉罕的大腿下，為這事向亞伯拉罕起誓。

ccb.text: 于是，老总管就把手放在他主人亚伯拉罕的大腿底下，为这事向他起誓。

csbs.text: 于是那仆人就把手放在他主人亚伯拉罕的大腿底下，为这事向他起誓。
